author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Resolved. NpyElement is now implemented for half::f16 (behind feature "f16") and half::bf16 (behind new feature "bf16"); both reuse the existing bulk-read/bulk-write macro since half 2.x exposes to_ne_bytes/from_ne_bytes. dtype_parse accepts the standard NumPy "f2" descriptor for f16 (fully interoperable with np.float16) and a ferray-specific "bf16" descriptor for bfloat16 (NumPy has no native bf16 dtype). load/save/load_dynamic/save_dynamic all route F16 and BF16 through. The ferray umbrella crate now forwards ferray/f16 → ferray-io/f16 and ferray/bf16 → ferray-io/bf16 so end users get it transparently. 11 new tests cover dtype-string parsing, 1D/2D/DynArray round-trip for f16, 1D/DynArray round-trip for bf16, and header-descriptor verification. Also fixed 3 pre-existing clippy lints in tests (same-item-push and approx-constant PI) while here. 79 lib + 12 property tests pass on default, f16, bf16, and combined feature sets.
